channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East  The Guardian
  2. March 1, 2026 — Day two of the launch of a US-Israeli military operation against Iran  CNN
  3. Middle East crisis live: Israel launches new attacks on Tehran and Beirut as Trump lays out objectives  The Guardian
  4. A 4th U.S. soldier has died as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
  5. Trump says 'we expect casualties' after Iran strikes but 'in the end it's going to be a great deal for the world'  NBC News

item.title: Sinking Iran’s proxies, Sinwar’s Al-Aqsa Flood left Khamenei high and dry - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Sinking Iran’s proxies, Sinwar’s Al-Aqsa Flood left Khamenei high and dry  The Times of Israel
  2. The C.I.A. Helped Pinpoint a Gathering of Iranian Leaders. Then Israel Struck.  The New York Times
  3. Khamenei's death met with public mourning, quiet celebrations as regime's opponents wait for an opening  NBC News
  4. Who runs Iran now? An uncertain path to new supreme leader after Khamenei’s death.  The Washington Post
  5. China condemns Iran strikes, urges Gulf to oppose foreign influence  USA Today

item.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal, involve European allies in deterrence - Reuters
item.description:
1. France to boost nuclear arsenal, involve European allies in deterrence  Reuters
  2. France offers to station nuclear assets across Europe for the first time  Financial Times
  3. Macron says France will allow temporary deployment of nuclear-armed jets to allied nations  NBC News
  4. France to increase nuclear warheads, lend nuclear aircraft to Europe allies  Al Jazeera
  5. France to increase its number of nuclear warheads, Macron says – as it happened  The Guardian

item.title: Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict - BBC
item.description:
1. Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict  BBC
  2. Starmer criticises Trump over Iran strikes, as he defends UK position  BBC
  3. UK ‘took far too long’ to let US use its airbases to attack Iran, Trump says  The Guardian
  4. UK will allow US to use bases to strike Iranian missile sites, PM says  BBC
  5. Starmer says he will give US permission to use UK bases for Iran missions  Politico

item.title: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes - CNBC
item.description:
1. Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes  CNBC
  2. Asia airline stocks drop while energy shares rise as Iran conflict escalates  CNBC
  3. The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation  CNN
  4. What to do if your flight is cancelled due to the US-Israel war on Iran  The Guardian
  5. Airlines cancel flights, issue travel waivers over Middle East unrest  Fox Business

item.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines - The New York Times
item.description:
1. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times
  2. Iran war: Will Europe's split on US strikes backfire?  DW.com
  3. Europe defends military bases and struggles to evacuate citizens as it is drawn into the war on Iran  Los Angeles Times
  4. GORDON SONDLAND: No more 'restraint': Europe must stand with America on Iran  Fox News
  5. US allies and foes left scrambling as Trump catches them off-guard on Iran  The Guardian

item.title: Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone  The New York Times
  2. U.K. Believes Attack on Its Cyprus Base Came Before Starmer Allowed U.S. to Use Bases  WSJ
  3. Iranian-made drone hits British air base in Cyprus  Reuters
  4. Two drones intercepted heading for RAF base, Cyprus says  BBC
  5. ‘Simply not true’ UK is being dragged into Iraq-style conflict, says foreign secretary  The Guardian

item.title: Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel  Al Jazeera
  2. Hezbollah just restarted the fight that Israel was waiting to finish  CNN
  3. Despite Its Weakness, Hezbollah Plunges Lebanon Back Into War  The New York Times
  4. Israel kills 31 in Beirut strike following Hezbollah rocket attack  Al Jazeera
  5. Israeli military says it killed head of Hezbollah's intelligence headquarters  Reuters

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
  3. Trump: ‘I don’t care about polling’ showing Iran strikes unpopular  The Hill
  4. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  5. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN

item.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
item.description:
1. India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal  BBC
  2. Canada’s Leader Hails New Ties With India, Setting Aside Rift Over Killing  The New York Times
  3. Canada, India Strike $1.9 Billion Uranium Supply Agreement as They Firm Ties  WSJ
  4. Pressure on Carney to address Indian interference allegations after Modi meeting  The Guardian
  5. Carney Meets Modi in New Delhi, Marking New Chapter in Ties  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Iran attack on giant Saudi refinery pushes up oil prices - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran attack on giant Saudi refinery pushes up oil prices  Axios

  4. Saudi Arabia’s Biggest Oil Refinery Halts After Drone Attack  Bloomberg.com
  5. As Iran targets oil infrastructure, Middle East war threatens global economy  France 24

item.title: Qatar shoots down two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets over airspace as Gulf states suffer Iran strikes - The Jerusalem Post
item.description:
1. Qatar shoots down two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets over airspace as Gulf states suffer Iran strikes  The Jerusalem Post

  4. Qatar says it shot down two Iranian Su-24 bombers  ایران اینترنشنال

item.title: Afghanistan Says Pakistan Tried to Strike Prized Air Base - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Afghanistan Says Pakistan Tried to Strike Prized Air Base  The New York Times
  2. Afghan Taliban reportedly target Pakistani jets over Kabul  DW.com
  3. Afghanistan says it thwarted Pakistan airstrikes on Bagram airbase  The Guardian
  4. Pakistan says it is in ‘open war’ with Afghanistan as nations exchange strikes  The Washington Post
  5. Pakistan, Afghanistan show no signs of stepping back as fighting enters fifth day  Reuters

item.title: Iran Is Shooting at Some of the World’s Busiest Airports - WSJ
item.description:
1. Iran Is Shooting at Some of the World’s Busiest Airports  WSJ

  4. Where Iran has retaliated across the Middle East, according to satellite images and videos  The Washington Post

item.title: Live updates: Trump warns Iran about larger strikes as war spirals in Middle East - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Trump warns Iran about larger strikes as war spirals in Middle East  CNN
  2. Trump defends Iran strikes, offers objectives for military operation  NPR
  3. Trump says war against Iran moving "substantially ahead" of schedule  Axios
  4. ‘I Have Agreed to Talk’  The Atlantic
  5. Trump vows to 'avenge' the deaths of U.S. service members, says combat operations continue  CNBC
